sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103726" key="texnopai/gnion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τεχνο-παίγνιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n103726.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">game of art</tr_>, esp. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a way of showing off one's powers of verse-making</tr_>, 'jeu d'esprit', title of a poem by Ausonius.</sense> </entryFree>
